name: Southwest Blackeyed Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Tobasco or other hot sauce, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat and let simmer for at least 10 minutes, or up to 20-25 minutes for best flavor.
